title: Crunch DAO
summary: CrunchDAO is a decentralized predictive intelligence network pairing institutions with a global research community, and its Arcium work centers on confidential model training and secure prediction execution for sensitive data and proprietary models.
description:
CrunchDAO runs a decentralized AI network where institutions publish high-stakes modeling challenges and a global research community competes to produce stronger signals. The official site currently markets the network around 11,000 AI researchers, 1,200 PhDs, 40,000 ML models, and 140,000 AI tasks completed.

Both Arcium and CrunchDAO have published partnership announcements describing the collaboration as privacy-preserving decentralized AI. Arcium frames the integration around confidential model training and secure prediction execution, while CrunchDAO says Arcium's MPC framework helps Crunchers run nodes without exposing models or sensitive contributor data.

bodySections.title: Why_It_Matters
bodySections.body: CrunchDAO is aimed at prediction problems where institutions care about signal quality and data confidentiality at the same time. Its public positioning spans finance, healthcare, life sciences, energy, and other high-stakes environments where proprietary datasets and model IP cannot be casually exposed.

bodySections.title: Arcium_Relevance
bodySections.body: This is a confirmed Arcium integration. Arcium's partnership page explains the stack in terms of confidential model training and secure prediction execution. CrunchDAO's own partnership post says Arcium's MPC framework enables node operators to preserve model ownership, protect private data, and keep results auditable while the network decentralizes.

statusNote: Dedicated partnership material on both Arcium and CrunchDAO describes confidential model training, secure prediction execution, and Arcium MPC support for decentralized node operators.
